steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says manul habitats are in "out-of-the-way parts" of Asia, meaning remote and hard to reach. The blank must complete "habitats so ______ large human populations" in a way that explains why research on manuls is difficult.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'drawn to': "drawn to large populations" means attracted toward humans. Contradicts the "out-of-the-way" detail — eliminate. ✗
  • Choice B — 'full of': "full of large populations" means densely populated. Directly contradicts a remote, isolated habitat — eliminate. ✗
  • Choice C — 'distant from': "distant from large populations" means remote and hard to reach. Perfectly matches "out-of-the-way" and explains why research is difficult. ✓
  • Choice D — 'responsible for': "responsible for large populations" is grammatically awkward and makes no logical sense in context — eliminate. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
